name: Cube002
heading: The Logic Spark
description: Physics taught me how the world works; coding lets me build how it works. That 'brain on fire' feeling when a bug is fixed is the same rush I felt when a student finally grasped Newton's Third Law.

name: Cube
heading: The Heart of the Classroom
description: I miss the energy of my students every day. My transition hasn't replaced my love for teaching; it has built a protective cage around those core values of mentorship and clear communication.

name: humeroL
heading: The Mentor's Reach
description: The humerus represents my reach as an educator. Even in tech, I find myself reaching back to those teaching roots to explain complex systems and foster collaboration within my team.

name: humeroR
heading: The Builder's Reach
description: This is my reach into the IDE. It represents the active extension of my skills into a new frontier, grasping onto logic and syntax to create something from nothing.

name: cubradL
heading: Technical Dexterity
description: The forearm provides the fine motor skills for the hand. This represents the precision required in Physical Science—measuring, calculating, and observing—now translated into clean, precise code.

name: cubradR
heading: The Hand-Off
description: This is the bridge between my two careers. It represents the smooth hand-off from a life of lesson plans and grading to a life of pull requests and deployment.

name: Cube001
heading: The Weight-Bearer
description: The femur is the body's strongest bone. Leaving a stable career for the unknown required massive heavy lifting—countless late nights mastering logic while carrying the weight of a total career pivot.

name: Cube005
heading: The Ground Game
description: Taking my first 'step' into the coding sphere was daunting. But coaching taught me that progress happens one meter at a time. I moved forward the only way I knew how: one foot in front of the other.

name: omoplatoR
heading: The Stable Foundation
description: Coaching hockey and cricket taught me resilience and discipline. This stable foundation is what keeps me grounded when I'm faced with a particularly stubborn bug or a complex architectural challenge.

name: omoplatoL
heading: The Pivot
description: Just like the flexible scapula, I had to find a new range of motion. I dug deep to reach into a field where I had zero experience and pulled myself up into this new identity as a developer.
